skills.name: Granata
skills.description: Throws a grenade towards a designated area to attack the enemy. The attacked enemies are knocked down where they stand.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 6 times
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Tre Granate
skills.description: Throws three molotovs towards a designated area to deal continuous damage to enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Discover more
Handbags & Purses
Doll
Respiratory Conditions
Target: CaptionRatio2
Duration: 12 seconds

skills.name: Ritirarsi
skills.description: The player leaps backward after dropping a grenade in place. You do not take damage while the skill is in use.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 6 times
Discover more
Coffee
Handbags & Purses
Respiratory Conditions
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Recupero
skills.description: The player injects a syringe on self to recover HP and STA.
skills.effect_text:
Discover more
coffee
Respiratory Conditions
Coffee
Recovers HP by CaptionRatio %
Recovers STA by CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Invasione
skills.description: Attacks the enemy in front by stabbing them. If there is [Gunpowder] buff, decrease the stack of the [Gunpowder] buff, and damage up to 5 enemies with the same Attack as Invasione when attacking the enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Taglio
skills.description: Dashes forward and slashes at enemies in the way. Enemies are knocked back and the player receives a temporary boost in movement speed.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Movement Speed: + CaptionRatio
Maximum duration: CaptionTime seconds

attributes.name: Granata: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Granata] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Tre Granate: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Tre Granate] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Tre Granate: Lingering Flames
attributes.description:
* Continues to deal damage for 1 second per attribute level to enemies that have escaped the range of Tre Granate

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Ritirarsi: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Ritiarsi] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Recupero: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the HP recovery of [Recupero] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Invasione: Charge
attributes.description:
* Increases movement speed by 10, and decreases Damage received by 7.5% for 10 seconds when using [Invasione]

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Taglio: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Taglio] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Taglio: Remove Knockback
attributes.description:
* Removes [Taglio]'s knockback effects

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Invasione: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Invasione] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Leather Mastery: Plate
attributes.description: * While equipped with 4 pieces of [Leather] armor, your Physical Defense is increased by 25% and damage taken is reduced by 5%.

attributes.name: [Arts] Recupero: Endurance
attributes.description:
* Removes the HP recovery from [Recupero] and increases the buff duration to 30 seconds.

* While [Recupero] is active, the Stamina consumption from dashing is reduced by half.

attributes.name: [Arts] Granata: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Granata] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Tre Granata: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Tre Granate] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Ritirarsi: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Ritirarsi] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Invasione: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Invasione] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Taglio: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Taglio] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Ardito: Assault
attributes.description:
* [Gunpowder]buff stacks 3 for 30 seconds when using Granata, Tre Granate, Ritirarsi.

* Critical Rate of Ardito skill increases by 10% per 1 [Gunpowder] stack

* [Fresh Blood] buff stacks 3 for 30 seconds when using Invasion, Taglio.

* Final Damage of Ardito skill increases by 1% per 1 [Fresh Blood] stack

* [Gunpowder] can be stacked until 5 stacks maximum, [Fresh Blood] can be stacked until 10 stacks maximum

attributes.name: [Arts] Ritirarsi: Attach
attributes.description:
* Does not Leap

* Applies [Ritirarsi] debuff to enemy

* Debuff applied enemy explodes after 3 seconds and attack up to 7 enemies

* Can be attached to the enemy in a certain distance

* Delays the resurrection for 10 seconds

* Ignores the resurrection buff

attributes.name: Taglio: Tenacity
attributes.description:
* Duration is changed to 5 seconds

* Movement Speed increase effect is removed

* Increases Cooldown by 10 seconds

attributes.name: Granata: Aim
attributes.description: * [Granata] skill is changed to point target skill and can be thrown further
